title: Monteverdia urbanii
taxonomy: Monteverdia urbanii is classified as a species of plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the Americas and belongs to the genus Monteverdia. This genus comprises around 90 species of flowering plants. Monteverdia urbanii is a member of the larger clade Sapindales, which includes various families of flowering plants. The classification of Monteverdia urbanii is based on its morphological characteristics, genetic analysis, and phylogenetic studies.
